hyperedges.label: Tauri API wrappers for database CRUD
React data hooks wrapping Tauri API

nodes.label: Supabase Row Level Security Profiles Setup
nodes.norm_label: supabase row level security profiles setup

nodes.label: Session Storage Migration Safety
nodes.rationale: localStorage session and profile keys use version checking ('1.0') to automatically clear old or incompatible session schemas and prevent state corruption.

nodes.label: Standardized React Data Hook Pattern
nodes.rationale: Standardized pattern for React hooks wrapping Tauri API classes, ensuring consistent handling of data, loading states, error states, and manual refetch capabilities.

nodes.label: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Hierarchy
nodes.rationale: Supports admin, teacher, and student roles in a hierarchical layout. Admin has access to all routes; teacher can access teacher and student routes; student can only access student routes.

nodes.label: Next.js Static Export Configuration
nodes.rationale: Tauri requires a static HTML export (output: 'export'), meaning Next.js dynamic server components, dynamic API routes, and standard middleware cannot be run on a node server.

nodes.label: Custom Titlebar Window Decorations
nodes.rationale: OS window decorations are disabled (decorations: false) in order to render a custom Header component that integrates cleanly with the application's visual theme and window layout.
